name: Choreganized: Life Admin
description: Stay on top of every chore, reminder, and recurring task - from car maintenance to home upkeep to personal health. Smart scheduling and clear priorities, all stored privately on your device.

features.title: Recurring Tasks
features.description: Set tasks to repeat daily, weekly, monthly, or on any custom schedule. Choreganized remembers so you don't have to.

features.title: Smart Reminders
features.description: Get notified at the right time, not just the next time you open the app. Timely nudges that keep you on track.

features.title: Priority System
features.description: Mark tasks as high, medium, or low priority. See what actually needs your attention today.

features.title: On-Device Privacy
features.description: All your data stays on your device. No accounts, no cloud sync, no data sharing. Your home life is your business.

features.title: Smart Scheduling
features.description: Choreganized spaces out tasks intelligently so your to-do list doesn't pile up on one day.

faqs.question: Is my data stored on my device?
faqs.answer: Yes. Choreganized stores all your tasks and reminders locally on your device. No account required, no data sent to external servers.

faqs.question: Can I set recurring reminders?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. You can set any task to recur on a schedule - daily, weekly, monthly, every X days, or on specific days of the week.

faqs.question: Is Choreganized free?
faqs.answer: Choreganized is free to download with core features. A one-time unlock is available for advanced scheduling features and unlimited task categories.

faqs.question: Is Choreganized available on Android?
faqs.answer: Currently Choreganized is available on iOS. Android support is planned for a future release.
